      • getName

        public java.lang.String getName()
        Description copied from interface: ProofScriptCommand
        Returns the name of this proof command. The name should be constant and not be clash with the name of other commands. The name is essential for finding this command within an hashmap.
        Returns:
        a non-null, non-empty string
        See Also:
        ProofScriptEngine

      • execute

        public void execute(SMTCommand.SMTCommandArguments args)
             throws ScriptException,
                    java.lang.InterruptedException
        Overrides:
        execute in class AbstractCommand<SMTCommand.SMTCommandArguments>
        Throws:
        ScriptException
        java.lang.InterruptedException
